postCreateCommand: setup-env.sh && install-mcps.sh && setup-skills.sh && sync-skills.sh || true && if [ -f ~/.claude.json ]; then jq '. + {"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"installMethod":"native"}' ~/.claude.json > /tmp/claude.json && mv /tmp/claude.json ~/.claude.json; else echo '{"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"installMethod":"native"}' > ~/.claude.json; fi
